packageRules.description: Group non-major updates into a single PR to cut noise.
Auto-merge devDependency minor/patch once CI is green.

Pin the deliberately-paired toolchains: vitest 3 + pool-workers 0.8 (vitest 4 breaks pool-workers), and vite 6 + plugin-react 4 (plugin-react 6/vite 8 break the build). Major/minor bumps need explicit dashboard approval; patches still flow.
